configuration.description: Configuration parameters for the required input.

details.description: Input details can also be provided recursively.

inputDetails.description: Input details can also be provided recursively (deprecated).

itemSearchUrl.description: In case of a select, the URL from which to query the items.

items.description: In case of a select, the items to choose from.

key.description: The value to provide in the result.

optional.description: True if this input value is optional.

type.description: The type of the required input.

value.description: The value can be pre-filled, if available.
